meaning: n.欢乐,喜悦,快乐,乐事,乐趣v.高兴 Joy 乔伊(女子名)
examples: To his great joy, she accepted.
I exulted and wept for joy.
Her three children brought her joy.
On the surface side, Joy has nearly twice the sales of its nearest competitor, Bucyrus International.
But it's a special joy to have so many bright, smart and talented young people here.
